2850914       0 /usr/bin/bash -c RUN_TS=$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S) OUT="phase7_results/results/runtime_cleanup_${RUN_TS}.json" export OUT mkdir -p phase7_results/results .venv/bin/python3 - <<'PY' import json, os, subprocess, time from pathlib import Path  ts = time.strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S%z') out = os.environ['OUT']  def run(cmd):     p = subprocess.run(cmd, shell=True, text=True, capture_output=True)     return {"cmd": cmd, "rc": p.returncode, "stdout": p.stdout.strip(), "stderr": p.stderr.strip()}  pre_tmux = run("tmux ls || true") pre_ps = run("ps -u $USER -o pid,etimes,cmd | rg -i 'phase7|worker.py|train_state_decoders|causal_audit|benchmark_faithfulness' || true")  post_tmux = run("tmux ls || true") post_ps = run("ps -u $USER -o pid,etimes,cmd | rg -i 'phase7|worker.py|train_state_decoders|causal_audit|benchmark_faithfulness' || true") gpu = run("nvidia-smi --query-gpu=index,utilization.gpu,memory.used,memory.total --format=csv,noheader,nounits")  payload = {     "schema_version": "phase7_runtime_cleanup_v1",     "timestamp": ts,     "user": os.environ.get("USER"),     "safe_scope": "current_user_only",     "pre": {"tmux": pre_tmux, "processes": pre_ps},     "actions": {"killed_tmux_sessions": [], "killed_pids": [], "notes": ["No current-user phase7 tmux sessions/processes found."]},     "post": {"tmux": post_tmux, "processes": post_ps, "gpu_snapshot": gpu}, } Path(out).write_text(json.dumps(payload, indent=2)) print(out) PY
